name: Lantern Shadows
author: Pete
description: Enables realtime shadows on lanterns and allows them to be switched on/off individually. Be careful as shadows may have a big impact on performance.

modSettings.name: PreventDayNightLightSwitch
modSettings.tooltip: If set to true, lanterns will no longer be switched on/off automatically during night/day.

modSettings.name: EnableLightToggle
modSettings.tooltip: Allow lanterns to be toggled on/off with the interact key.

modSettings.name: TurnOffParticlesOnDisable
modSettings.tooltip: Turn particles and sound effect off if the lantern is switched off.

modSettings.name: EnableShadows
tooltip: Disable shadows being cast by lanterns.
Use this if you only want to switch lanterns on/off but dont want the shadow effects.

modSettings.name: EnableAutomaticLightControlsKey
tooltip: Use this key on lantern that you switched on or off manually, to restore automatic light controls.
After restoring automatic light controls, lanterns will automatically switch on/off during night/day.
Only works if "Prevent autom. day/night light switch" is disabled.

modSettings.name: ToggleShadowsKey
tooltip: Assign a key and use it on any individual lantern to switch shadows on or off for this specific lantern.
Only works if "Enable shadows" has been enabled.
